description: Daft.ie is an Irish property marketplace for homes, rentals, commercial property, and related listings. Its public-facing platform also provides programmatic access to a subset of listing data for third-party developers.
summary: Daft.ie exposes a SOAP-over-HTTP property-data API that requires a Daft-issued API key, plus a public SSE MCP server at https://mcp-ui.daft.ie/mcp.
